title: BSNC Director Louie Green, Jr. Receives FWS Alaska Native Leader/Elder Conservation Hero Award
summary: BSNC congratulates BSNC Director Louis “Louie” Green Jr. of Nome on being awarded the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service (FWS) Regional Director’s Alaska Native Leader/Elder Conservation Hero Award.
